adjudication_raw:
Review: Receipt extraction model evaluation.

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed

The 8.4 pp accuracy gap has two configuration confounds: the vendor's receipt-specific enterprise tier was not evaluated, and the vendor ran with English-only settings on a 30%-bilingual test set while the startup was bilingual fine-tuned. The startup's specialized model may well outperform the vendor under fair conditions, but the magnitude of the current gap is inflated by these configuration mismatches. The right next step is an empirical comparison with the vendor properly configured.

empirical_test.measure: Exact-field accuracy on the full 8,400-receipt evaluation set
empirical_test.success_criterion: Startup leads vendor (receipt-specific parser + bilingual mode) by ≥ 5 pp
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Startup lead below 5 pp with vendor reconfigured appropriately
